name: Arena Token Broker
description: Gen reCAPTCHA token cho arena-web2api server. Server chạy trên Termux, extension chạy trên Kiwi Browser.
content_security_policy: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src ws://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* https://arena.ai
